Sword Boys.description: Street gang in Perth, Western Australia, consisting mostly of Lebanese Australians, known since the mid-1990s. Members wear a miniature gold scimitar on a chain. Involved in amphetamine and ecstasy distribution, and linked to car rebirthing. Several members were convicted in 2016 for drug trafficking.

descriptions: Members of Sword Boys have links to a Perth Asian street gang.
edges.evidence_quote: The brothers have links to a notorious Perth Asian street gang jailed for their involvement in the 2013 extortion of a karaoke bar.

descriptions: Sword Boys is linked to car rebirthing operations by Western Sydney gangs.
edges.evidence_quote: Sword Boys ... has also been linked to car rebirthing by Western Sydney gangs, where stolen cars are stripped and reassembled.

'Ndrina Ruga.description: The 'Ndrina Ruga is a 'ndrina (mafia clan) of the 'Ndrangheta based in Monasterace, Italy. It was dominant in the Stilaro Valley until the mid-1990s, involved in construction contracts, agricultural control, and kidnappings in the 1980s. The clan has been found in Baden-Württemberg, Germany, and allied with the Metastasio, Leuzzi, and Gallace-Novella clans. Its leadership shifted to the Metastasio brothers after the Ruga were imprisoned.

descriptions: Gallace are allied with Ruga di Monasterace.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono alleate dei Leuzzi di Stignano e dei Ruga di Monasterace.

descriptions: Lo Presti had ties with Ruga.
edges.evidence_quote: Ha avuto legami con tutte le più importanti famiglie mafiose della Calabria e della Sicilia . I Belfiore , i Tripodo , i Mesiani Mazzacuva, i Ruga , gli Aquino , gli Ierinò , i Macrì , i Morabito , i Varacalli , i Cataldo , gli Strangio , i Barbaro , gli Alvaro , i Palamara , i Raso-Albanese e i Facchineri .

descriptions: Ruga are allied with Gallace-Novella.

descriptions: Ruga are allied with Metastasio.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono alleate dei Metastasio di Stilo

descriptions: Ruga-Metastasio were in a feud with Sia-Procopio between 2008 and 2012.
edges.evidence_quote: Tra il 2008 e il 2012 scoppiò una faida tra i Ruga-Metastasio e i Sia-Procopio

descriptions: Ruga were involved with Commisso in water transport.
edges.evidence_quote: Avrebbero dovuto pagare un 'diritto di carico' per evitare rischi durante il trasporto delle bottiglie d'acqua lungo la penisola, in cui erano coinvolti anche i Commisso

descriptions: Sia and Ruga were opposing sides in the Seconda faida dei boschi.
edges.evidence_quote: Seconda faida dei boschi : scoppiata nel 2008 e conclusa nel 2013 grazie all'operazione Confine , tra i Vallelunga , Novella , Sia , Tripodi, Procopio e Lentini contro i Gallace , Ruga e Metastasio.

descriptions: Vallelunga and Ruga were opposing sides in the Seconda faida dei boschi.
edges.evidence_quote: Seconda faida dei boschi : scoppiata nel 2008 e conclusa nel 2013 grazie all'operazione Confine , tra i Vallelunga , Novella , Sia , Tripodi, Procopio e Lentini contro i Gallace , Ruga e Metastasio.

Naserligan.description: Criminal organization based in Gothenburg, Sweden, founded by Naser Dzeljilji around 2000. Involved in drug trafficking, illegal gambling, armed robbery, extortion, and protection racketing. Gained notoriety in 2001 for a violent conflict with the Original Gangsters over control of the illegal gambling market. Membership is diverse, including individuals of Albanian and Swedish descent.

descriptions: Naserligan and Original Gangsters were in a violent conflict over control of illegal gambling in Gothenburg.
edges.evidence_quote: Naserligan gained notoriety in 2001 when it became embroiled in a violent conflict with another gang, the Original Gangsters.

descriptions: Original Gangsters and Naserligan engaged in violent conflict over profitable activities in Gothenburg.
edges.evidence_quote: The first known large-scale violent conflict was in 2000, with the Naserligan gang, the members of which was of Albanian extraction.

descriptions: The infobox lists Naser Gang as a rival of the Serb mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Princ Gang , UÇK , Naser Gang

descriptions: Hunt's Point Family Bloods is a set of the United Blood Nation.
edges.evidence_quote: 9 members of the Hunt’s Point Family Bloods were arrested for engaging in sex trafficking of a child.

British firms.description: British firms are organised crime groups originating in the United Kingdom, predominantly composed of White British individuals but also including other ethnicities. They are involved in a wide range of criminal activities including drug trafficking, racketeering, and extortion. The groups have expanded operations to Spain, the Netherlands, and Thailand. They are considered the dominant organized crime presence in the UK despite the rise of foreign gangs.

edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: British firms , Turkish mafia

Kumi 415.description: Predominantly African-American prison gang formed in Folsom State Prison in the mid-1980s, with founding members from the San Francisco Bay Area. The name derives from Swahili 'kumi' (ten) and the sum of 415, which is also San Francisco's area code. Members use African symbols and Swahili language in their culture and tattoos. The gang operates in several California prisons and jails.

descriptions: KUMI 415 is listed as a current ally of BGF in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Current: , Black Disciples , Bloods , Crips , Dead Man Incorporated , El Rukn , KUMI 415 , Norteños , Nuestra Familia

time_periods: period leading up to Stanley Williams' execution
edges.evidence_quote: In the Monterey County Jail , brief alliances have been reported among the Bloods, Crips, and Kumi 415 during the period leading up to Stanley Williams ' execution.

descriptions: Crips and Kumi 415 formed a brief alliance in Monterey County Jail.

descriptions: Kumi 415 members serve as a recruitment pool for the Black Guerrilla Family.
edges.evidence_quote: Along with the Crips and Bloods , Kumi 415 members have recently provided recruitment pools for the Black Guerrilla Family , a gang with similarly large numbers in the Bay area and Northern California .

descriptions: Giampà and Cerra-Torcasio-Gualtieri were once a single organization but split and became rivals in a violent war.
edges.evidence_quote: A partire dal 2002, a seguito della sentenza del processo Primi passi i locali di 'ndrangheta dei Cerra-Torcasio-Gualtieri e quello dei Giampà, che un tempo costituivano un'unica organizzazione criminale, a seguito di una grave scissione interna diventano protagonisti di una cruenta guerra di mafia.

descriptions: Giampà and Torcasio-Gualtieri made peace in 2015 after a feud.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel 2015 con l'operazione Andromeda viene fatta luce sulla pace tra gli Iannazzo-Giampà ed i Torcasio-Gualtieri avvenuta anche grazie alla mediazione di clan del reggino.

LockBit.description: LockBit is a cybercriminal group that operates a ransomware-as-a-service (RaaS) model, first appearing on a Russian-language cybercrime forum in January 2020. The group develops ransomware that encrypts victims' data and threatens to leak it publicly if ransoms are not paid. It was the most prolific ransomware in 2022, responsible for 44% of global ransomware incidents in early 2023. Despite law enforcement takedowns in 2024 and 2025, the group has attempted to continue operations.

descriptions: Evil Corp affiliated with LockBit as a ransomware group.
edges.evidence_quote: Between 2022 and 2024, Evil Corp diversified its tactics and began affiliating with other ransomware groups, including LockBit.

descriptions: LockBit's disruption may have boosted Akira, indicating a competitive dynamic.
edges.evidence_quote: Researchers linked its continued activity to the leaked LockBit builder and noted that disruption of the group may have boosted rival operations like Akira and RansomHub.

descriptions: LockBit cooperates with Maze.
edges.evidence_quote: They hire network access brokers, cooperate with organizations like Maze, and recruit insiders from targeted companies.

descriptions: Mora_001 used a variant of LockBit 3.0, suggesting a possible operational link or shared infrastructure.
edges.evidence_quote: cybersecurity researchers at Forescout reported that a ransomware group known as Mora_001 had used a variant of LockBit 3.0, also known as LockBit Black, as the foundation for a new strain called SuperBlack.

descriptions: LockBit's disruption may have boosted RansomHub, indicating a competitive dynamic.
edges.evidence_quote: Researchers linked its continued activity to the leaked LockBit builder and noted that disruption of the group may have boosted rival operations like Akira and RansomHub.
